title: 菊花賞の後に・絆の勝利！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek takes the Kikuka crown and rushes
back to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We bask in the glory of a victory earned through
the power of our bond.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leaving behind the Classics that taught us so
much, we set our sights on the Nakayama
racecourse winter race—the Arima Kinen!
